name: Zing Jelly Fruit 40g
short_description: Zing Jelly Fruits 40g is a yummy, fruity candy full of juicy, zingy flavour that will zing in your mouth with every bite! Tender, chewy, and bursting with a blast of flavour, they are great on the go or for sharing a chew with your friends. Presented in a handy 40g pack, it’s easy to take with you and enjoy as a tasty snack.
